# Generated by scripts/generate_variable_harvests.py; do not edit by hand.
# Active harvest modifiers are combined by subcontinent and severity for readable UI.

# Combined active harvest modifiers.
# western_europe
pp_harvest_western_europe_abysmal = {
	game_data = { category = location }
	local_peasants_food_consumption = 0.30
	local_wheat_output_modifier = -0.80
	local_millet_output_modifier = -0.80
	local_maize_output_modifier = -0.80

# middle_east
pp_harvest_middle_east_abysmal = {
	game_data = { category = location }
	local_peasants_food_consumption = 0.30
	local_wheat_output_modifier = -1.00
	local_millet_output_modifier = -1.00
	local_maize_output_modifier = -1.00
	local_rice_output_modifier = -0.60
	local_legumes_output_modifier = -0.50
	local_fiber_crops_output_modifier = -0.20
	local_cotton_output_modifier = -0.50
	local_tobacco_output_modifier = -0.50
	local_dyes_output_modifier = -0.50
	local_fruit_output_modifier = -0.63
	local_olives_output_modifier = -0.63
	local_wine_output_modifier = -0.63
	local_cocoa_output_modifier = -0.50
	local_coffee_output_modifier = -0.50
	local_tea_output_modifier = -0.50
	local_sugar_output_modifier = -0.50
	local_silk_output_modifier = -0.50
	local_incense_output_modifier = -0.50
	local_saffron_output_modifier = -0.50
	local_pepper_output_modifier = -0.50
	local_cloves_output_modifier = -0.50
	local_chili_output_modifier = -0.50
	local_medicaments_output_modifier = -0.50
	local_potato_output_modifier = -0.30
	local_livestock_output_modifier = -0.30
	local_wool_output_modifier = -0.30
	local_beeswax_output_modifier = -0.30
	local_horses_output_modifier = -0.05
	local_elephants_output_modifier = -0.30
	local_fish_output_modifier = -0.10
	local_fur_output_modifier = -0.10
	local_wild_game_output_modifier = -0.10
}

	local_millet_output_modifier = -1.00
	local_maize_output_modifier = -1.00

	local_legumes_output_modifier = -0.63
	local_fiber_crops_output_modifier = -0.25

	game_data = { category = location }

	local_wheat_output_modifier = 0.60

	local_maize_output_modifier = 0.60

	local_wheat_output_modifier = -0.80

}

pp_harvest_pacific_islands_poor = {
	game_data = { category = location }
	local_peasants_food_consumption = 0.11
	local_wheat_output_modifier = -0.30
	local_millet_output_modifier = -0.30
	local_maize_output_modifier = -0.30
	local_rice_output_modifier = -0.30
	local_legumes_output_modifier = -0.19
	local_fiber_crops_output_modifier = -0.08
